getJiraIssue_PROJ-101:
Issue: PROJ-101
Summary: Allow users to export reports as PDF
Priority: High
Status: In Progress
Reporter: alice@example.com
Component: Reporting
Labels: ux, reporting, export
Description:
Users frequently request the ability to export dashboard reports as PDF files for sharing with stakeholders who do not have system access. Currently only CSV export is supported, which loses formatting and charts.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Export button on report view
- Generated PDF preserves charts and table formatting
- File downloads immediately in the browser
URL: https://yourorg.atlassian.net/browse/PROJ-101
getJiraIssueComments_PROJ-101:
Comment by bob@example.com (2024-03-10):
This is blocking our quarterly business review. We manually screenshot every chart right now. A proper PDF export would save each team ~2 hours per quarter.

Comment by charlie@example.com (2024-03-12):
We evaluated pdf-lib and puppeteer. Puppeteer gives the most accurate rendering of our Chart.js components but adds ~80ms per page to generation time. Acceptable given the use case.

Comment by alice@example.com (2024-03-14):
Linked to PROJ-88 (chart rendering refactor) - that work needs to land first or PDF output may look broken for stacked bar charts.
